## Scope Review

- Coherent outcome:
- Change class and rationale:
- Applicable gate (concerns / ordinary files / ordinary lines):
- Independently reviewable concerns or subsystems:
- Ordinary files changed:
- Ordinary lines changed (added + deleted):
- Generated output (paths; files / lines / resulting bytes; generator/version; tracked inputs; exact command; pinned visual environment; clean regeneration; validation): None
- Vendored output (paths; files / resulting bytes; authority; provenance/hash/license/storage rationale): None
- Lock files (paths; files / lines / resulting bytes; manifest; tool version; reproduction command): None
- Source issue design review: Not required / link or summary
- Planning review: Not required / link or summary
- Split plan and parent/child issues:
- Oversized single-PR exception (exceeded gate; measured values; inseparability/safety rationale; owner approval): N/A / link
- New manifest, lock, workflow, provider, account, network, runtime, build, test, or operational dependency and consequences: None / approved decision link
- Unrequested work and incidental findings disposition: None / omitted and reported / approved replan link
- New abstractions or extension points: None / current accepted use or established boundary
- Follow-up issue mutation authority: None / explicit user instruction / explicit source-issue authority / owner-accepted enumerated split plan (link exact issues)

- [ ] The change class was selected from accepted authority before editing and was not changed to fit the diff.
- [ ] This PR is within every applicable ordinary and generated/vendored/lock gate.
- [ ] If this PR exceeds a gate, its recorded inseparability/safety rationale and explicit owner approval are linked above. (N/A if within all gates.)
- [ ] Numeric headroom was not used to add an unaccepted concern, dependency, cleanup, refactor, abstraction, test, or documentation.
- [ ] This PR is independently safe and mergeable; unfinished capability remains disabled where applicable.
